title: Preview 2024 - Welcome to ETSU
body: So what I’ve learned about your school is that Mike Isratel was in your PhD program and he submitted a low quality paper with 100s of errors. Someone on YouTube reviewed it and found it should have never passed and then it seems Mike tried to cover that up in what appears to be academic fraud. And ETSU has yet to respond to the videos and articles discussing this.
author: @JaredFeathers-z1i

title: Haunted Tri-Cities: A look inside the halls of ETSU
body: They are just pranking , bored or wanting negative attention. I never sensed, felt, heard, nor seen anything. I can not say that for Milligan University where I was a Security Officer years ago. Hexpol in Jonesborough too. No spirits in Domtar.
author: @robertcurtis3807

title: Episode 31: Dr. Kevin E. O’Donnell on John Green, the ETSU Common Read, and good writing that beg...
body: 11:40 When I mention "Rome" here I should have explained it's Rome, Georgia. The geographical area covered by the book runs from Georgia to Maine -- same region that the Appalachian Trail runs thru

title: COLLEGE WEEK IN MY LIFE: FIRST WEEK OF CLASSES// ETSU

title: Day in the Life of a D1 Tennis Player | Match Day vs Tennessee Tech
body:
Fala Carlos, tudo bem? Parabéns pelo canal e pela trajetória! Meu filho ta querendo seguir mais ou menos o mesmo caminho que o seu. Quer estudar nos EUA com bolsa de tenis. Ele tem 13 anos e ainda é iniciante. Eu imagino que chegar numa D1 é um pouco difícil pra ele, pela idade. Ele começou a jogar há pouco tempo, cerca de 1 ano.

Qual dica você daria pra ele? Quais são as melhores universidades pra ele pleitear uma bolsa? Considerando um nível de tênis menor, tipo um D3, ou menos. Grande abraço e Sucesso!
author: @evertongoisif
